2026-04-21T23:55:09.6983523Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6984527Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6984948Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6985316Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6985624Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6985870Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6986037Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6986225Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6986400Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6986632Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6986837Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6987126Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-21T23:55:09.6987391Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

If provided, the 'direction' also needs to be provided.","enum":["CREATED_AT","UPDATED_AT","COMMENTS"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Repository owner","type":"string"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"repo":{"description":"Repository name","type":"string"},"since":{"description":"Filter by date (ISO 8601 timestamp)","type":"string"},"state":{"description":"Filter by state, by default both open and closed issues are returned when not provided","enum":["OPEN","CLOSED"],"type":"string"}},"required":["owner","repo"],"type":"object"},"name":"list_issues"},{"annotations":{"readOnlyHint":true,"title":"Search issues"},"description":"Search for issues in GitHub repositories using issues search syntax already scoped to is:issue","icons":[{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"light"},{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"dark"}],"inputSchema":{"properties":{"order":{"description":"Sort order","enum":["asc","desc"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Optional repository owner. If provided with repo, only issues for this repository are listed.","type":"string"},"page":{"description":"Page number for pagination (min 1)","minimum":1,"type":"number"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"query":{"description":"Search query using GitHub issues search syntax","type":"string"},"repo":{"description":"Optional repository name. If provided with owner, only issues for this repository are listed.","type":"string"},"sort":{"description":"Sort field by number of matches of categories, defaults to best match","enum":["comments","reactions","reactions-+1","reactions--1","reactions-smile","reactions-thinking_face","reactions-heart","reactions-tada","interactions","created","updated"],"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_issues"}]}}}

2026-04-21T23:57:13.1552359Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-21T23:55:58.764245321Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58466,\"title\":\"[Search] Docs: add code examples for SearchAlias and image vector search (VectorizableImageBinaryQuery/VectorizableImageUrlQuery\\n[Content truncated due to length]\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.Search.Documents`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/search/Azure.Search.Documents/`\\n**Triggered by:** commit [REDACTED] (PR #58180) by `@efrainretana`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #58180 updated the README for `Azure.Search.Documents` to cover 12.0.0 features, including knowledge base retrieval, DI/IConfiguration support, `SearchAlias`, and image-based vector search. The update added links and prose descriptions for `SearchAlias` and `VectorizableImageBinaryQuery`/`VectorizableImageUrlQuery` but did not add working code examples backed by test snippets for these two features.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- No sample test file or markdown doc demonstrating `SearchAlias` (index alias create/get/delete lifecycle)\\n- No sample test file or markdown doc showing image-based vector search with `VectorizableImageBinaryQuery` and `VectorizableImageUrlQuery`\\n- The README Vector Search section links to the existing `Sample07_VectorSearch.md` which covers text/vectorized queries but omits image queries\\n- The README Key Concepts `SearchAlias` bullet points to external REST docs; no inline C# code example exists anywhere in the samples directory\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\nNo existing files need structural edits. New files must be created.\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n#### 2a — Index Alias sample test file\\n\\nCreate `sdk/search/Azure.Search.Documents/tests/Samples/Sample13_IndexAlias.cs` with the following structure (adapt based on existing test infrastructure — use `SearchResources`, `SearchTestBase`, `Recording` as in `Sample01_HelloWorld.cs`):\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Search.Documents.Indexes;\\nusing Azure.Search.Documents.Indexes.Models;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.Search.Documents.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public partial class Sample13_IndexAlias : SearchTestBase\\n    {\\n        public Sample13_IndexAlias(bool async, SearchClientOptions.ServiceVersion serviceVersion)\\n            : base(async, serviceVersion, null /* RecordedTestMode.Record /* to re-record */)\\n        {\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        public async Task CreateAndQueryWithAlias()\\n        {\\n            await using SearchResources resources = await SearchResources.GetWithHotelsIndexAsync(this);\\n            SearchIndexClient indexClient = resources.GetIndexClient();\\n            string aliasName = Recording.Random.GetName();\\n\\n            #region Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample13_CreateAlias\\n            // Create an alias pointing to an existing index\\n            var alias = new SearchAlias(aliasName, new[] { resources.IndexName });\\n            await indexClient.CreateOrUpdateAliasAsync(aliasName, alias);\\n            #endregion Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample13_CreateAlias\\n\\n            #region Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample13_SearchWithAlias\\n            // Query via the alias name instead of the index name directly\\n            SearchClient aliasClient = resources.GetClient(aliasName);\\n            SearchResults results = await aliasClient.SearchAsync(\\u0026#34;*\\u0026#34;);\\n            await foreach (SearchResult result in results.GetResultsAsync())\\n            {\\n                SearchDocument doc = result.Document;\\n            }\\n            #endregion Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample13_SearchWithAlias\\n\\n            #region Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample13_DeleteAlias\\n            await indexClient.DeleteAliasAsync(aliasName);\\n            #endregion Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample13_DeleteAlias\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n#### 2b — Image vector search sample test file\\n\\nCreate `sdk/search/Azure.Search.Documents/tests/Samples/Sample14_ImageVectorSearch.cs` using `VectorizableImageUrlQuery` and `VectorizableImageBinaryQuery`. Use the same pattern as `Sample07_VectorSearch_UsingVectorizableTextQuery.cs`:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Search.Documents.Models;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.Search.Documents.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    [PlaybackOnly(\\u0026#34;Requires a vectorizer-enabled index\\u0026#34;)]\\n    public partial class Sample14_ImageVectorSearch : SearchTestBase\\n    {\\n        public Sample14_ImageVectorSearch(bool async, SearchClientOptions.ServiceVersion serviceVersion)\\n            : base(async, serviceVersion, null /* RecordedTestMode.Record /* to re-record */)\\n        {\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        public async Task SearchWithImageUrl()\\n        {\\n            // Assumes an index with a vector field configured with an image vectorizer\\n            await using SearchResources resources = SearchResources.CreateWithNoIndexes(this);\\n            SearchClient client = resources.GetClient();\\n\\n            #region Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample14_VectorizableImageUrlQuery\\n            // Search using an image URL — the service vectorizes the image automatically\\n            SearchResults results = await client.SearchAsync(\\n                new SearchOptions\\n                {\\n                    VectorSearch = new VectorSearchOptions\\n                    {\\n                        Queries =\\n                        {\\n                            new VectorizableImageUrlQuery(new Uri(\\u0026#34;(example.com/redacted)\\n                            {\\n                                KNearestNeighborsCount = 3,\\n                                Fields = { \\u0026#34;imageVector\\u0026#34; }\\n                            }\\n                        }\\n                    }\\n                });\\n            await foreach (SearchResult result in results.GetResultsAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine(result.Document[\\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;]);\\n            }\\n            #endregion Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample14_VectorizableImageUrlQuery\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        public async Task SearchWithImageBinary()\\n        {\\n            await using SearchResources resources = SearchResources.CreateWithNoIndexes(this);\\n            SearchClient client = resources.GetClient();\\n\\n            #region Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample14_VectorizableImageBinaryQuery\\n            // Search using raw image bytes (base-64 encoded internally by the SDK)\\n            byte[] imageBytes = System.IO.File.ReadAllBytes(\\u0026#34;path/to/image.png\\u0026#34;);\\n            SearchResults results = await client.SearchAsync(\\n                new SearchOptions\\n                {\\n                    VectorSearch = new VectorSearchOptions\\n                    {\\n                        Queries =\\n                        {\\n                            new VectorizableImageBinaryQuery(imageBytes)\\n                            {\\n                                KNearestNeighborsCount = 3,\\n                                Fields = { \\u0026#34;imageVector\\u0026#34; }\\n                            }\\n                        }\\n                    }\\n                });\\n            await foreach (SearchResult result in results.GetResultsAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine(result.Document[\\u0026#34;id\\u0026#34;]);\\n            }\\n            #endregion Snippet:Azure_Search_Documents_Tests_Samples_Sample14_VectorizableImageBinaryQuery\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n#### 2c — README placeholder additions\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/search/Azure.Search.Documents/README.md`\\n\\n1. In the **Examples** section (around line 267), add entries for alias and image vector search to the bullet list:\\n   ```markdown\\n   * [Index alias management](#index-alias-management)\\n   * [Image-based vector search](#image-based-vector-search)\\n   ```\\n\\n2. After the existing `### Knowledge base retrieval and management` section, add:\\n\\n   ```markdown\\n   ### Index alias management\\n\\n   Use `SearchIndexClient` to create an alias that points to one or more indexes, then query through the alias name:\\n\\n   ```\\n   ```\\n\\n   ```\\n   ```\\n\\n   ```\\n   ```\\n\\n   ### Image-based vector search\\n\\n   Use `VectorizableImageUrlQuery` or `VectorizableImageBinaryQuery` to search using images. The service must have a vectorizer configured on the target vector field.\\n\\n   **Search by image URL:**\\n\\n   ```\\n   ```\\n\\n   **Search by image bytes:**\\n\\n   ```\\n   ```\\n   ```\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README already contains all six required sections (Getting started, Key concepts, Examples, Troubleshooting, Next steps, Contributing) in the correct order. Only the **Examples** section needs new entries as described above.\\n\\nReference: `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md`\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/search/Azure.Search.Documents/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/search/Azure.Search.Documents/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 search` — confirms README placeholder blocks are populated from `#region Snippet:` tags\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 search` — only needed if public types changed (not required here)\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/search/Azure.Search.Documents/`\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt;
